heading: Sampling
label: 5372 Sampling
text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, wine may be utilized in any bonded wine cellar for testing, tasting, or sampling, free of tax.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5372, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 667Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
